case_title: WEBB, E. DONNELL vs. SAN FRANCISCO AREA POST INC/CAL/CO/DBA CITIPOST

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBB, E. DONNELL AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AREA POST INC/CAL/CO/DBA CITIPOST
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
